component.name: php-phpimap
component.summary: PHP IMAP library for managing mailboxes

description.p: PHP IMAP Mailbox is a powerful and open source library to connect to a mailbox by POP3, IMAP and NNTP using the PHP IMAP extension. Allows fetching emails with attachments and inline images, filtering by custom criteria, marking emails as seen/unseen, deleting emails and managing mailbox folders.
